[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1110010 4
1 0001101 3
2 0101111 5
3 0001101 3
4 0000111 3
5 0111101 5
6 0000000 a
7 1000100 2

01 10 1000100 2 match 7
12 21 1010000 2
23 32 0000000 a match 6
34 43 0001101 3 match 1 3
45 54 0001101 3 match 1 3
56 65 0000101 2
67 76 0000101 2
70 07 0000100 1

02 20 1000000 1
13 31 0001101 3 match 1 3
24 42 0100010 2
35 53 0001101 3 match 1 3
46 64 0000111 3 match 4
57 75 0001101 3 match 1 3
60 06 0000100 1
71 17 0011101 4

03 30 0000100 1
14 41 0001101 3 match 1 3
25 52 0000000 a match 6
36 63 0000101 2
47 74 0101101 4
50 05 0000100 1
61 16 0000101 2
72 27 0110000 2

04 40 0000100 1
15 51 0001101 3 match 1 3
26 62 0000010 1
